role: Aggregates auto-generated inventories and risk assessments of the project's public interface and codebase health.
responsibility: Provides a single source of truth for the public API surface (CLI commands, MCP tools, exported modules) and identifies high-risk files with detailed analysis to aid refactoring prioritization.

children.role: An auto-generated inventory of the project's public interface, listing CLI commands, MCP tools, and exported modules to provide a single source of truth for what the system exposes externally.
Risk assessment report for the ArchSpine project, identifying and detailing high-risk files within the codebase.
